name: db-query-tool
description: MCP tool for raw SQL query execution. Connection resolved implicitly via schema x-persistence metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: ArkType params schema: { sql: string, params?: any[], connection?: string }
Executes SQL via BunSqlExecutor using named connection
Normalizes result rows via normalizeRows() for camelCase keys
Returns { ok: true, rows: any[], rowCount: number }
Returns { ok: false, error: {...} } on execution failure
Uses 'default' connection if connection param not specified
registerDbQuery(server) follows existing tool registration pattern
Validates connection exists before attempting query
Handles both SELECT (returns rows) and DML (returns affected count) statements
